nodes.name: Cache lookup (Supabase)
nodes.notes: Optional RPC `cache_lookup(p_area_id, p_sector)`. If not created, this returns empty array and the workflow proceeds to fresh generation.

parameters.jsCode:
const row = $input.first().json[0];
return [{ json: { ...row.response, from_cache: true, run_id: row.id, source: 'supabase-cache' } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "area_id": "{{ $json.query.area_id }}",
  "area_name": "{{ $json.query.area_name }}",
  "sector": "{{ $json.query.sector }}",
  "coordinates": {{ JSON.stringify($json.query.coordinates) }},
  "emissions_summary": {{ JSON.stringify($('Validate + build query').first().json.emissions_summary) }},
  "retrieved_chunk_ids": {{ JSON.stringify($json.retrieved_chunk_ids) }},
  "retrieved_data_chunk_ids": {{ JSON.stringify($json.retrieved_data_chunk_ids) }},
  "response": {{ JSON.stringify($json) }},
  "llm_model": "anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "source": "n8n-rag",
  "expires_at": "{{ new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 86400 * 1000).toISOString() }}"
}
